user_story: As an Employee, I want to view a list of my timesheet entries with start date, end date, project, recorded hours, status and per-day hours, so that I can review my logged time at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Timesheet Details screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns for Start date, End date, Project, Recorded hours, Status and each weekday (Su-Sa)

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my timesheets by a period (From and To dates), so that I can find entries for a specific date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Timesheet Details screen; When I set the From and To dates and click Search; Then only timesheets within that period are listed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my timesheets by status (All, Pending for submission, Submitted), so that I can focus on timesheets in a particular state
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Timesheet Details screen; When I select a Status and click Search; Then only timesheets matching that status are displayed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can quickly clear my criteria and view all timesheets again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied period or status filters; When I click Reset; Then the filters are cleared and the default list is shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to add a new timesheet entry from this screen, so that I can start recording time for a new period
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Timesheet Details screen; When I click Add new timesheet entry; Then I am taken to the timesheet entry form

user_story: As an Employee, I want to refresh the timesheet list, so that I can see the latest saved entries and statuses
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Timesheet Details screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
